query:
UPDATE sellers s SET totalSales = (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM sales WHERE sellerId = s.id AND status = 'approved'), totalPoints = (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM sales WHERE sellerId = s.id AND status = 'approved');
SELECT id, name, department, totalSales, totalPoints FROM sellers WHERE active = true ORDER BY totalSales DESC;
